Features

A complete workspace for modern software teams.

Search, filter, inspect, and combine AI features with the developer workflows teams already use.

AIProjectsDeploymentGitAnalytics

AI Pairing

Plan, code, summarize, and review work with context-aware AI assistance.

Learn More

Developer Dashboard

Track projects, tasks, deployments, health, and velocity in one workspace.

Learn More

Code Workspace

A VS Code-inspired interface with file explorer, tabs, terminal, and run actions.

Learn More

Workflow Automation

Move ideas through AI, development, review, and deploy pipelines.

Learn More

Analytics

Area charts, progress rings, heat maps, and operational insights built for teams.

Learn More

Secure by Default

Clear permission boundaries, audit-friendly activity, and team controls.

Learn More 
const workflow = await devflow.ai.run({
  context: "launch checklist",
  mode: "review",
  output: ["tasks", "tests", "deploy"]
});
AI

AI workflows that stay fast under pressure.

Each area includes preview states, action buttons, benefits, and responsive behavior suitable for a production-grade product UI.
